title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 546.670 - Recognizance, when broken
text:
546.670.  Recognizance, when broken. — No recognizance given under the provisions of section 546.650 shall be deemed to be broken, unless the principal therein be convicted of some offense amounting, in judgment of law, to a breach of such recognizance.
(RSMo 1939 § 4099) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3710; 1919 § 4054; 1909 § 5260
